metadata.description: Collection of Claude Code skills and plugins — tracker, integrations, and productivity workflows

plugins.name: claude-skill-tracker
plugins.description: Track Claude Code skill usage to your CLIProxy Dashboard — tokens, duration, tool calls, project context, all automatic

plugins.name: git-sync
plugins.description: Auto-sync git repo: pulls latest (main + submodules) on session start, auto-commits and pushes all changes when Claude stops.

plugins.name: lark-mcp
plugins.description: Lark / Feishu MCP server — integrate Claude with Lark Suite (messages, docs, calendar, bitable, approval workflows). Requires LARK_APP_ID and LARK_APP_SECRET env vars.

plugins.name: diagram
plugins.description: Generate ASCII and Mermaid diagrams — flowcharts, sequence diagrams, architecture, Gantt, ERDs, state machines. Auto-selects format based on context.

plugins.name: raindrop
plugins.description: Manage Raindrop.io bookmarks — save, search, organize collections and tags via Raindrop API.

plugins.name: mikrotik-manager
plugins.description: Manage MikroTik routers — configure firewall rules, routing, VPN, DHCP, wireless, and diagnose network issues via RouterOS API.

plugins.name: google-analytics-reader
plugins.description: Query Google Analytics 4 reports — traffic, events, conversions, audience segments. Outputs structured summaries and trend analysis.

plugins.name: lark-suite
plugins.description: Work with Lark / Feishu — send messages, manage docs, query bitable records, handle calendar events and approval workflows. Requires the lark-mcp plugin for full runtime integration.

plugins.name: social-image
plugins.description: Generate Facebook Stories (1080×1920) and Post (1080×1080) images with abstract wave/mesh backgrounds and centered title + excerpt/quote content.

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Google Workspace CLI auth setup and cross-product workflows — standup reports, meeting prep, weekly digests using the gws CLI.

plugins.name: google-gmail
plugins.description: Send, reply, triage and stream Gmail via gws CLI — full threading support, inbox triage, and realtime NDJSON streaming.

plugins.name: google-drive
plugins.description: Manage Google Drive files via gws CLI — list, upload, search, share, and manage permissions.

plugins.name: google-sheets
plugins.description: Read, write, and manage Google Sheets via gws CLI — includes Python helper script for CSV import/export and formatted table output.

plugins.name: save-and-release
plugins.description: Save your work safely, push it when ready, and handle GitHub releases with version bumps, tags, release notes, and advisory gitleaks checks.

plugins.name: set-up-docker-app-updates
plugins.description: Set up a Docker app so new versions can be built, published, and rolled out with a simple, repeatable update flow.

plugins.name: set-up-macos-app-updates
plugins.description: Set up a macOS app to show its current version and let users know when an update is available.

plugins.name: design-ui
plugins.description: Canonical frontend design skill for creating, reviewing, or restyling UI across 6 design families and 20 exemplars, from editorial and SaaS clarity to premium, tactile, and experimental directions.

plugins.name: redesign-skill
plugins.description: Audit-first redesign skill for existing websites and apps. Reuses the same design brain as design-ui, but focuses on low-risk, stack-preserving upgrades.

plugins.name: mcp-to-cli
plugins.description: Generate standalone CLIs or make one-off tool calls from MCP servers using mcporter. Use when the user wants to convert an MCP into a compiled CLI, inspect available MCP tools, import MCP definitions from Claude Code/Cursor/Codex, authenticate remote HTTP MCPs, or call MCP tools without registering the server in Claude Code.

plugins.name: jira-task-manager
plugins.description: Create and manage Jira tasks for the AI project, assign tasks to correct team members, assign to sprints, and link to appropriate Epics. Use when user wants to create, update, or manage Jira tickets.

plugins.name: confluence-publishing
plugins.description: Publish markdown deliverables to Confluence with compliant formatting, metadata syncing, and automation hooks. Use when the user wants to publish a document to Confluence, update an existing Confluence page, sync local markdown to Confluence, or mentions push to Confluence, đăng lên Confluence, or cập nhật trang Confluence.

plugins.name: telegram-permission-alert
plugins.description: Send Telegram alerts when Claude Code shows a permission dialog, so you can come back and approve blocked work quickly. Sends metadata only, not raw pending command content.
